---
title: "Colecciones"
toc: false
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---

<style>
.navbar {
  position: sticky !important;
  top: 0;
  width: 100%;
  min-height: 50px;
  background-color: #faf8f5 !important;
  border: none !important;
  box-shadow: none !important;
  z-index: 1000;
}

.navbar .container-fluid {
  min-height: 90px;
  align-items: center;
}

.catalog-section {
  padding-top: 0px !important;
}
</style>

::: {.catalog-section}

# COLECCIONES

Espejos que transforman espacios  
y reflejan tu esencia.

<div class="collection-grid"><a href="#" class="collection-card"><img src="img/organicos.png" alt="Orgánicos"><div class="collection-title">ORGÁNICOS</div></a><a href="redondos.html" class="collection-card"><img src="img/redondos.png" alt="Redondos"><div class="collection-title">REDONDOS</div></a><a href="arco.html" class="collection-card"><img src="img/arco.png" alt="Arco"><div class="collection-title">ARCO</div></a><a href="irregulares.html" class="collection-card"><img src="img/irregulares.png" alt="Irregulares"><div class="collection-title">IRREGULARES</div></a></div>

<a href="ver_todos.html" class="view-all-button">VER TODO</a>

:::
